audio.name: Archive
audio.description: Archive lets you capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes through folders, labels, backlinks, and graph traversal.

versions.prompt: Archive, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes, ideas, research, and knowledge.
versions.fullPrompt:
Create an audio asset for Archive.

Target:
- Type: capability
- Slug: archive
- Description: Archive lets you capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes through folders, labels, backlinks, and graph traversal.

Feature ideas: Capture ideas, research, meeting notes, and daily thoughts.; Organize notes into folders and labels.; Search semantically and traverse knowledge relationships..

Audio system:
English-only premium AI product voiceover. Use a clear adult male voice, controlled pacing, precise articulation, and a calm technical tone suitable for Vorinthex AI launch assets.

Timing:
- Exact intended duration: 20 seconds.
- Pace: 72 BPM equivalent pulse, cinematic and controlled.
- The file will be merged later into a Vorinthex AI video with ffmpeg.


Creative direction:
- Match the Vorinthex visual identity: obsidian space, chrome geometry, orbital motion, intelligent enterprise software.
- Keep the asset clean enough for product launch loops and UI galleries.
- Create a smooth intro, subtle midsection movement, and a clean tail that can cut at the requested duration.

Custom instruction:
Archive, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes, ideas, research, and knowledge.

Negative prompt:
No vocals, no lyrics, no dialogue, no cheap EDM, no horror sting, no comedy sound effects, no busy percussion, no distorted clipping, no sudden loud transient.

versions.prompt: Vorinthex AI catalog. Products, capabilities, and autonomous orchestrators across the Nexus of Intelligence. Core, your central intelligence that learns, remembers, evolves with you, and expands through powerful Capabilities orbiting your Brain. Command, your AI command center with C-suite orchestrators that think, plan, and execute while you lead the vision. Studio, your unified AI workspace for chat, image, video, music, voice, code, documents, and research. Launch, your lightweight platform to create agents, automations, and workflows, then deploy them everywhere your work happens. Atlas CEO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for vision, leadership, direction, executive strategy, and company-level decisions. Hermes COO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for operations, execution, efficiency, systems, process, and delivery. Metis CIO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for intelligence, knowledge, data, documents, RAG, internal brain, and integrations. Apollo CSO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for strategy, foresight, growth, market direction, and long-term planning. Iris CCO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for communication, brand, voice, PR, messaging, and internal and external communications. Ledger CFO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for finance, capital, budgets, cash flow, forecasting, and financial risk. Orbit CMO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for marketing, growth, demand, branding, content, campaigns, SEO, and social. Mercury CRO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for revenue, analytics, MRR, forecasting, sales patterns, churn, and retention. Sentinel CISO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for security, risk, protection, compliance, privacy, and trust. Athena CPO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for product, experience, innovation, roadmap, value, and users. Forge CTO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for technology, architecture, engineering, infrastructure, and AI. Themis CLO, your fully autonomous agent orchestrator for legal, governance, ethics, contracts, compliance, and policy. Archive, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it capture, organize, semantically search, and connect your notes, ideas, research, and knowledge. Gallery, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it organize memories and images into smart albums, clusters, shared links, QR invites, and AI-powered discovery. Signal, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it filter inbox noise, prioritize important messages, and reply in your tone when approved. Compass, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it map visited places, future destinations, travel memories, and plans on an interactive 3D globe. Ascend, add this capability to your personal AI Brain to help it coach your goals, habits, health, routines, finance, and custom AI-generated learning journeys. Explore the galaxy, build your intelligence, and join the Nexus before launch.
